content.content: Model and Instagram influencer also known as La Chama who shares a mix of her personal and professional lives on the account alexandramendezof. She has garnered more than 1 million followers. She registered for her XandraMendez Twitter account in November of 2010. She partnered with the supplement company Xibion. She is from Venezuela, but has spent much of her life living in Peru. She andCristiano Ronaldohad their private WhatsApp messages publicized to the media.
